task: Move the white mug from the right to the left of the travel cups
raw:
Scene: white_mug, travel_cups, table
Step 1: reach(white_mug)
  affordance_region: the body of the white mug
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, white_mug, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, white_mug) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(white_mug)
  affordance_region: the handle of the white mug
  contact: holding(white_mug) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(white_mug)
Step 3: transport(white_mug -> left_of_travel_cups)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the left of the travel cups
  spatial: above(white_mug, table, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(white_mug)
  done_when: above(white_mug, table, 0.05)
Step 4: place(white_mug -> left_of_travel_cups)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the left of the travel cups
  contact: surface_contact(white_mug, table) [completion]; released(white_mug) [completion]
  pose: stable(white_mug) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(white_mug, table) AND released(white_mug) AND stable(white_mug)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the white mug
the handle of the white mug
an empty area on the left of the travel cups
an empty area on the left of the travel cups
steps.done_when: surface_contact(white_mug, table) AND released(white_mug) AND stable(white_mug)
